big_picture: PM Modi will chair a meeting with Chief Ministers tomorrow to discuss the West Asia crisis. The Lok Sabha has passed a bill to amend trans rights, with the Opposition calling it 'draconian'. The bill removes the right to self-perceived gender identity for transgender persons and makes medical evaluation and certification mandatory for legal recognition. Two Indian vessels have crossed the Strait of Hormuz, with two foreign-owned and foreign-flagged LPG carriers expected to reach Vishakhapatnam on March 30, 2026.
